Operation 'getSubscription' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Current description is too vague and lacks specificity about what data is returned. The summary mentions '(pro)' which is unclear context. Improved version specifies the subscription information returned, references the appropriate schema (SubscriptionInfo), clarifies authentication requirements, and helps AI agents understand what subscription data they can retrieve.

data.current_description: Returns status, details and statistics for your account
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve subscription status and account details
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the authenticated user's subscription information including subscription tier, status, quota limits, usage statistics, and billing details. Returns a SubscriptionInfo object containing current plan details and account metrics. Requires valid API key authentication.
data.reasoning: Current description is too vague and lacks specificity about what data is returned. The summary mentions '(pro)' which is unclear context. Improved version specifies the subscription information returned, references the appropriate schema (SubscriptionInfo), clarifies authentication requirements, and helps AI agents understand what subscription data they can retrieve.

message: Operation 'getImageEmbeddings' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are severely lacking. Description is completely empty, making it impossible for AI agents to understand the operation's purpose or usage. Improved version clarifies that this generates vector embeddings (not just 'gets' them), explains the input requirements (plant images), specifies the output schema (EmbeddingsResult), describes practical use cases (similarity search, ML), and includes authentication requirements. This enables AI agents to understand when and how to use embeddings in plant identification workflows.

data.summary_suggestion: Generate vector embeddings from plant images
data.description_suggestion: Generates vector embeddings for plant images for use in similarity search and machine learning tasks. Accepts one or more plant images as input and returns EmbeddingsResult containing high-dimensional vector representations of the images. These embeddings can be used to find visually similar plants or for downstream ML applications. Requires valid API key authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are severely lacking. Description is completely empty, making it impossible for AI agents to understand the operation's purpose or usage. Improved version clarifies that this generates vector embeddings (not just 'gets' them), explains the input requirements (plant images), specifies the output schema (EmbeddingsResult), describes practical use cases (similarity search, ML), and includes authentication requirements. This enables AI agents to understand when and how to use embeddings in plant identification workflows.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves daily quota consumption details for a specified date. Helps track daily usage patterns and quota reset cycles.
